response.justification: While Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience and strong software fundamentals, this role requires deep expertise in GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, SoC/IP modeling, and deep learning workload analysis. His background is primarily application and web development with limited systems-level hardware experience. His recent AI work focuses on agent infrastructure tooling rather than performance optimization of neural network workloads. This represents a significant domain shift without the specialized hardware and ML optimization expertise the Principal role demands.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD, and clean code practices across multiple roles
C++ and low-latency systems experience (National Instruments, Dunnhumby with high-performance databases and async I/O)
Exposure to embedded systems and hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, Apple TV/iOS development, GIS infrastructure)
concerns: No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator optimization experience—core technical requirements for this role
No deep learning, neural network training/inference optimization, or performance profiling of ML workloads mentioned
Background is predominantly application and web development; lacks systems-level hardware-software co-design expertise required for SoC/IP modeling and bottleneck analysis

key_factors.factor: Missing GPU architecture and AI accelerator expertise
No deep learning or neural network optimization background
Application-focused career path vs. required systems/hardware domain
